  FreeBSD doc repository

  Log:

    is no longer valid, however there could be added a new chapter on
    busdma [1] instead of this one
  
  [1] http://www.freebsd.org/projects/busdma/
  
  PR:             docs/126146
  Discussed with: jhb
  Submitted by:   gavin
  Approved by:    gabor (mentor)
